title: draba fastigiata
intro: Draba fastigiata, also known as the rock cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Draba fastigiata can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to aid in digestion and boost the immune system.
